videos.headline: Freiburg overcome St. Pauli in 119th minute
videos.title: Freiburg overcome St. Pauli in 119th minute
videos.caption: Michael Gregoritsch's last-gasp header in the 119th minute gives SC Freiburg a 2-1 victory over St. Pauli in the German Cup.
videos.description: Michael Gregoritsch's last-gasp header in the 119th minute gives SC Freiburg a 2-1 victory over St. Pauli in the German Cup.

videos.headline: Daschner's lovely dink puts St. Pauli in front
videos.title: Daschner's lovely dink puts St. Pauli in front
videos.caption: Lukas Daschner capitalizes on a Freiburg error to give St. Pauli a 1-0 lead.
